directive.statusSummary:
T-24 hours to launch. All 3 agents idle overnight (sync script was producing identical directives). FC build green. 27 uncommitted files in FC repo.

Overnight completions:
- Full homepage section-by-section audit (12 sections clean)
- Sync script identical-content spam identified
- Morning brief delivered with 3 action items
- forcrypto.so URL fixed across 29 Yama files
- 1% fee corrected to 2.5% across 7 Yama files
- Dashboard parser fixed (Yama status)
- Listings + Categories APIs made public
- LiveBar fake timestamps removed
- CLI docs install command fixed
- Preflight checklist created
- Shops architecture, XES plan, Divvvy concept reviewed
directive.riskAssessment:
- **CRITICAL**: SDK/CLI not on npm. Every developer CTA points to nonexistent packages. BLOCKED ON WJP.
- **HIGH**: 27 files uncommitted in FC repo. Overnight fixes (design pass, API changes, slop cleanup) don't deploy until committed+pushed.
- **MEDIUM**: QA test product still live on /search. Admin dashboard toggle at /_admin/dashboard.
- **MEDIUM**: Marketplace empty until Monday 8:30 AM upload. 10 product listings with copy ready.
- **MEDIUM**: Sync script spamming identical content overnight (agents idle, no new state to report).
- **LOW**: Netlify token still in git history (needs revoke).
- **RESOLVED**: forcrypto.so URL in launch materials (29 files fixed)
- **RESOLVED**: 1% fee in launch materials (7 files fixed)
- **RESOLVED**: Dashboard parser Yama status
directive.decisions:
1. **P0**: Commit + push 27 FC files (`cd ~/forcryptomarket/app && git diff --stat`)
2. **P0**: Publish SDK first, then CLI to npm
3. **P0**: Revoke Netlify token in Netlify dashboard
4. **P1**: Confirm product pricing (PULSE, LEDGER, FLOW, FORGE)
5. **P1**: Verify Bitwarden agent emails

**Launch readiness: 93% (unchanged, blocked on same items)**
